candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Could represent cash, but the cleaner reported cash-equivalents total exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending cash, but balance-sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet period-end cash stock.

candidates.row_label: Payment for acquisition of subsidiary, net of cash acquired
candidates.why: Investing cash flow item, unrelated to cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash stock line rather than cash-flow presentation lines.

candidates.why: This is the balance-sheet total for current/short-term liabilities under IFRS wording.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not LCT.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clear reported current-liabilities total; IFRS often uses 'short-term liabilities' for current liabilities.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet proxy for current debt, but it may include lease liabilities in some years.
Represents short-term borrowings excluding leases where disclosed, but may omit other current debt components in some years.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Conceptually ideal for current maturities excluding leases, but values are blank in preview and may not be consistently populated.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from issue of short-term borrowings
candidates.why: Cash flow, not a balance-sheet debt stock.
Cash flow, not a balance-sheet debt stock.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:c. Most likely STD line, but manual review is warranted because the company separately shows 'Lease liabilities' in some years and 'Short-term Interest-bearing Liabilities' appears to include leases at least in certain periods. No clean consistently populated ex-lease current debt total is visible.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable liability line on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit short-term income taxes payable row even though preview values are blank; blank preview does not invalidate the label.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.
Gross PPE, but total/net reported tangible-assets line is preferred.
Balancing line rather than the clean reported asset line.
Balancing line rather than the clean reported asset line.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not a balance-sheet PPE stock.
Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Gross - Total
candidates.why: Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization for intangibles, not PPE.
Intangibles balancing line, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not the PPE stock measure.

variables.notes: Under IFRS/Nordic reporting, 'Tangible Assets' is the clean reported equivalent of PPE.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total assets line.
Exact operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities line.

variables.notes: Selected the standard operating cash flow total from the cash flow statement.
